creator: csalgau-br@bitdefender.com
text:
System load:
Around 20 zfs clone/destroy operations every couple of minutes and about 200 permanent containers. Data served from within clones to scripts. During this time system load spikes to 12.0+, runs around 8.0.
System has 8 cores, 16 GB RAM, of which vm.kmem_size="10G", vfs.zfs.arc_max="8G".
Screencap of panic: http://img64.imageshack.us/img64/2903/021110zfscrash.jpg
Scrubs found no problems.

How-To-Repeat: Unknown. Usually load dependant. Did happen one when working with only one core hammered to 100%.
